title: Act 4/2025
text: Complaint lodged before the Hellenic Competition Commission by the company “GEORGIOS STERGIAKIS AND CO. LIMITED PARTNERSHIP” against the company “ELLINIKI RADIOPHONIA TILEORASSI S.A.” (“E.R.T.  S.A.”) Act 4/2025 File (PDF) Act 4/2025 Date of Issuance of Act May 21st,  2025 Relevant Market(s) The market for the assignment/acquisition of broadcasting rights for cinematographic films. The market for the retail supply of TV content Subject of the Act The complaint lodged before the HCC on 7.12.2022 by the company “GEORGIOS STERGIAKIS AND CO. LIMITED PARTNERSHIP” against the company “ELLINIKI RADIOPHONIA TILEORASSI S.A.” (“E.R.T.  S.A.”) Legal Framework Articles 1 and 2 of Law 3959/2011 Operative part of the Decision The complaint lodged on 7.12.2022 is closed by this Act without any further action as obviously unfounded, pursuant to Article 37 (1-2), in conjunction with Article 36 (4) of Law 3959/2011. This Act shall be notified to the parties concerned pursuant to Article 37 (3) of the same Law. Company(ies) concerned “GEORGIOS STERGIAKIS AND CO. LIMITED PARTNERSHIP” “ELLINIKI RADIOPHONIA TILEORASSI S.A.” (“E.R.T.  S.A.”) Judicial Proceedings - Decisions by the Court of Appeal of Athens (Administrative Division) -
